codeReview.summary: Submission assets were added, but the feature did not satisfy the requested end-to-end demo deliverable. The recorded WebM is only a headless page-navigation walkthrough, and the final submission doc still lacks a usable demo video link.

issues.description: The Demo Video section lists only frontend/explorer navigation, and line 143 explicitly says the WebM is a headless recording with no wallet transactions. As delivered, the demo does not show the required collateral deposit, borrow, partial repay, or health-factor change steps from the feature description and expected behavior.

The final submission doc does not provide a usable demo-video link. It references only a repo-local path (`docs/dualvm/demo-video.webm`) while claiming the video shows the complete flow, but there is no clickable hosted/blob URL and the companion guide admits the video omits live wallet transactions.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The docs-worker procedure does not tell submission-packaging workers to verify that demo assets are externally accessible and actually cover the requested user flow. That made it easy to treat a repo-local, non-interactive walkthrough as a finished submission asset.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/kpa/polkadot/.factory/skills/docs-worker/SKILL.md:30-31 says only 'Be truthful — no overclaiming', and 55-57 only requires tests/typecheck plus commit. The handoff at /home/kpa/.factory/missions/dc664f26-9086-4d9b-896d-ba8f3bde8d71/handoffs/2026-03-17T13-02-47-624Z__demo-video-submission__868e69ab-299d-45cb-9234-4d3796e11ba1.json:12 and :77-78 admits the recorded demo has no wallet transactions and still needs a real video URL update.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared state should record that Blockscout transaction pages can fail in headless agent-browser sessions, so submission/demo work may need a headed browser or API-based fallback for explorer evidence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The handoff file /home/kpa/.factory/missions/dc664f26-9086-4d9b-896d-ba8f3bde8d71/handoffs/2026-03-17T13-02-47-624Z__demo-video-submission__868e69ab-299d-45cb-9234-4d3796e11ba1.json:60-77 records client-side rendering errors on Blockscout in headless Chrome; /home/kpa/polkadot/.factory/library/user-testing.md:49-52 documents rate limiting and verification caveats but not this rendering failure.

summary: Fail: the feature added screenshots, a guide, and a WebM, but the committed demo submission still misses the required live deposit/borrow/repay/health-factor walkthrough and does not include a usable demo video link in the final submission doc.
